title: GROOVECRAFT 3
description:
A broad, classic-era feeling modpack that pushes the limits of Vanilla+ without stepping into silliness. 

Stay Groovy!
body:
A broad, classic-era feeling modpack that pushes the limits of Vanilla+ without stepping into silliness. 

Focused around Create and Farmer's Delight with MANY add-ons and compats for each. 

Featuring; Cars, Carts, Planes, Ships, Skateboards (ok maybe a lil silly), Iron's Spells, Aquaculture, Lootr, Enchanted Horseshoes, Guard Villagers, Gravestones, Tom's Simple Storage, backpacks, furniture, decorative blocks and block variants, Veinmining and Classic Pipes!

Now including The Aether and The Twilight Forest!

Several small amendments, quarks, and supplements, along with optimization mods.

Comes preloaded with a few basic resource packs and shaders.

Stay Groovy!
